hooks.command: input=$(cat); ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/claude-tone "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty')" & terminal-notifier -title "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.title // "Claude Code"')" -message "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // "Task complete"')" -sound default -group claude-notify 2>/dev/null; true
